creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sbz
Date: Tue Aug 14 14:47:15 2012
New Revision: 302523
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302523

Log:
  - Update to 0.3.0
  
  PR:		ports/170633
  Submitted by:	Kubilay Kocak <koobs.freebsd at gmail.com> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/security/py-oauthlib/files/
  head/security/py-oauthlib/files/patch-setup.py   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/security/py-oauthlib/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/security/py-oauthlib/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/security/py-oauthlib/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/security/py-oauthlib/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/security/py-oauthlib/Makefile	Tue Aug 14 14:46:58 2012	(r302522)
+++ head/security/py-oauthlib/Makefile	Tue Aug 14 14:47:15 2012	(r302523)
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	oauthlib
-PORTVERSION=	0.1.3
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.3.0
 CATEGORIES=	security net python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -17,16 +16,11 @@ COMMENT=	An RFC-compliant Python impleme
 
 LICENSE=	BSD
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}rsa>0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-rsa
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pycrypto>0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-pycrypto
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 # Python3 ready
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
-
-PYDISTUTILS_INSTALLARGS=	-Z -q -O 1 -N -S ${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR} \
-				-d ${PYEASYINSTALL_SITELIBDIR} \
-				-s ${PYEASYINSTALL_BINDIR} \
-				${WRKSRC}/dist/${PYEASYINSTALL_EGG}
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/security/py-oauthlib/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/security/py-oauthlib/distinfo	Tue Aug 14 14:46:58 2012	(r302522)
+++ head/security/py-oauthlib/distinfo	Tue Aug 14 14:47:15 2012	(r302523)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (oauthlib-0.1.3.tar.gz) = 6066c9c0ab07953f98870bc97d29f6defd066b6c215de74b9976666f3f6c3d40
-SIZE (oauthlib-0.1.3.tar.gz) = 24684
+SHA256 (oauthlib-0.3.0.tar.gz) = 8c62a18370b87fda3299bad4d4af2949e1bcb2d65519887ffcdcbcd00dfa9bf0
+SIZE (oauthlib-0.3.0.tar.gz) = 43581

Added: head/security/py-oauthlib/files/patch-setup.py
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/security/py-oauthlib/files/patch-setup.py	Tue Aug 14 14:47:15 2012	(r302523)
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+--- ./setup.py.orig	2012-08-14 19:04:25.000000000 +1000
++++ ./setup.py	2012-08-14 19:04:38.000000000 +1000
+@@ -32,4 +32,5 @@
+     tests_require=tests_require,
+     extras_require={'test': tests_require, 'rsa': rsa_require},
+     install_requires=requires,
++    zip_safe=False,
+ )
